name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Los Angeles, CA Western Union Money Order Only at 1324 W 7th St offers fast money order and check-cashing services 7 days a week, 5AM to 10PM.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 1324 W 7th St in Los Angeles is a standalone check-cashing location open daily from 5AM to 10PM. Located in central Los Angeles, CA, this location serves residents and visitors needing quick financial services without the wait times of traditional banks.

At this Los Angeles location, you can send money orders, cash checks, and access other essential financial services. Call 213-413-9711 to confirm current service availability or ask about fees. The staff is experienced in handling all types of money order requests and payment transactions.

If you're in Los Angeles needing a same-day money order, bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method. Western Union Money Order Only specializes in serving customers who need quick financial transactions outside standard banking hours, with extended daily availability.
pros: No bank account or credit card required to purchase
Prepaid format eliminates overdraft risk and ensures funds availability
Money orders do not expire (though service charges may apply after 1-3 years in some states)
Widely accepted for bill payments, particularly by property management companies that don't accept personal checks
Online refund request process available for purchasers with receipts
Available at thousands of physical Western Union locations nationwide
Safe alternative to sending cash for payments and sending money to others
cons: Not all Western Union locations can cash the money orders they sell, limiting redemption convenience
Fees vary by location with no transparent pricing stated on the website
Service charges may be deducted from the principal amount if money order is not used within 1-3 years (varies by state)
Requires in-person visit to purchase, with no online ordering option
Refund process may incur additional fees beyond the original purchase fee
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without checking accounts who need to pay bills or send money securely
Tenants paying rent to property managers who don't accept personal checks
People who prefer not to mail or send cash to friends, family, or service providers
Consumers in areas with limited digital payment infrastructure seeking secure payment alternatives
diagnosis: Western Union money orders are best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need a secure, prepaid payment method without a bank account, particularly for rent and bills. The main caveat is that not all Western Union locations can cash the money orders they sell, potentially limiting convenience, and fees vary unpredictably by location, requiring customers to confirm terms before purchase.
services: Money order purchase at physical Western Union locations
Money order cashing (where location-specific availability applies)
Money order status checking via receipt
Step-by-step guidance on filling out money orders
Location finder to identify nearby Western Union offices offering money order services
Payment acceptance via cash or debit card (depending on local location policies)
Secure payment method for bills, purchases, and fund transfers
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 1324 W 7th St, Los Angeles, CA. Fast money orders & check cashing open 5AM–10PM daily.
